manifest.name: Dropdown-menu
manifest.description: A dropdown menu for displaying a list of options or actions that are revealed upon user interaction.

advanced.title: With Labels And Separators
advanced.code:
(
    <DropdownMenu>
      <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
        <Button variant="outline">My Account</Button>
      </DropdownMenuTrigger>
      <DropdownMenuContent className="nx:w-56">
        <DropdownMenuLabel>My Account</DropdownMenuLabel>
        <DropdownMenuSeparator />
        <DropdownMenuGroup>
          <DropdownMenuItem>
            Profile
            <DropdownMenuShortcut>⇧⌘P</DropdownMenuShortcut>
          </DropdownMenuItem>
          <DropdownMenuItem>
            Billing
            <DropdownMenuShortcut>⌘B</DropdownMenuShortcut>
          </DropdownMenuItem>
          <DropdownMenuItem>
            Settings
            <DropdownMenuShortcut>⌘S</DropdownMenuShortcut>
          </DropdownMenuItem>
        </DropdownMenuGroup>
        <DropdownMenuSeparator />
        <DropdownMenuItem>
          Logout
          <DropdownMenuShortcut>⇧⌘Q</DropdownMenuShortcut>
        </DropdownMenuItem>
      </DropdownMenuContent>
    </DropdownMenu>
  )

advanced.title: With Checkbox Items
advanced.code:
<DropdownMenu>
        <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
          <Button variant="outline">View Options</Button>
        </DropdownMenuTrigger>
        <DropdownMenuContent className="nx:w-56">
          <DropdownMenuLabel>Appearance</DropdownMenuLabel>
          <DropdownMenuSeparator />
          <DropdownMenuCheckboxItem
            checked={showStatusBar}
            onCheckedChange={setShowStatusBar}
          >
            Status Bar
          </DropdownMenuCheckboxItem>
          <DropdownMenuCheckboxItem
            checked={showActivityBar}
            onCheckedChange={setShowActivityBar}
          >
            Activity Bar
          </DropdownMenuCheckboxItem>
          <DropdownMenuCheckboxItem
            checked={showPanel}
            onCheckedChange={setShowPanel}
          >
            Panel
          </DropdownMenuCheckboxItem>
        </DropdownMenuContent>
      </DropdownMenu>

advanced.title: With Radio Items
advanced.code:
<DropdownMenu>
        <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
          <Button variant="outline">Panel Position</Button>
        </DropdownMenuTrigger>
        <DropdownMenuContent className="nx:w-56">
          <DropdownMenuLabel>Panel Position</DropdownMenuLabel>
          <DropdownMenuSeparator />
          <DropdownMenuRadioGroup value={position} onValueChange={setPosition}>
            <DropdownMenuRadioItem value="top">Top</DropdownMenuRadioItem>
            <DropdownMenuRadioItem value="bottom">Bottom</DropdownMenuRadioItem>
            <DropdownMenuRadioItem value="right">Right</DropdownMenuRadioItem>
          </DropdownMenuRadioGroup>
        </DropdownMenuContent>
      </DropdownMenu>

guidance.whenToUse: Use a Dropdown-menu to group a list of related actions or options, saving space and presenting them contextually. Ideal for navigation, filtering, or action lists that don't need to be constantly visible.
guidance.whenNotToUse: Avoid using for only one or two options; use a simple Button or Toggle instead. Do not use for critical, immediate actions that require high visibility, or when all options must be visible simultaneously.
guidance.accessibility: Ensure proper keyboard navigation (Tab to open/close, Arrow keys to navigate items, Enter/Space to select). Implement appropriate ARIA attributes like `aria-haspopup`, `aria-expanded`, `aria-controls`, and `role='menu'` on the menu and `role='menuitem'` on items.

manifest.semanticDescription: The Dropdown-menu component provides an accessible and customizable way to present a list of interactive items, such as actions or options, in a compact overlay. It typically appears when a trigger element (e.g., a button) is clicked or hovered. Key features include keyboard navigation, customizable content, and flexible positioning. Use cases include user profile menus, action lists for data tables, filtering options, and contextual navigation.
